title: AEON
synopsis: Graduate Work 2017, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. Self-replicating entities that have evolved on different planets merge and proliferate exponentially. In search of more energy sources, they consume other stars. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: No Dialogue

tags.name: Cosmic Horror
tags.description: A type of horror that emphasizes human insignificance in the grand scope of cosmic reality; fearing the unknown and being powerless to fight it.

title: Tasuuketsu Judgement Assizes: THE ORIGINAL ANIMATION
titleRomaji: Tasuuketsu Judgement Assizes: THE ORIGINAL ANIMATION
titleNative: 多数欠 -Judgement Assizes- THE ORIGINAL ANIMATION
synopsis: A crowd-funded anime short adaptation of Taiga Miyagawa's Tasuuketsu -Judgement Assizes- manga.

tags.name: Super Power
tags.description: Prominently features characters with special abilities that allow them to do what would normally be physically or logically impossible.

title: Undetectable Box
synopsis: I often fall into the fantasy upon her back. What kind of person is she? What does she like? What world view does she hold? From the occasional detailed observations of her daily life, I have inferred many unexplainable clues... After a series of fantastic imagination, I suddenly realized that the girl who has been dialoging with me in my mind is just my own wishful thinking. Therefore, on the day of the reunion, I decided to take this step...

tags.name: Denpa
tags.description: Works that feature themes of social dissociation, delusions, and other issues like suicide, bullying, self-isolation, paranoia, and technological necessity in daily lives. Classic iconography: telephone poles, rooftops, and trains.

title: Ra/Radio Noise*Planet
titleNative: ラ/ラジオノイズ＊プラネット
synopsis: A planet with 6 inhabitants only. In order to match the tuning of the radio, the main character walks around and meets the 5 other inhabitants. A strange SF short animation.

title: Jing Wei Wu Jian
synopsis: Adapted from the JJWXC novel ‘Jing Wei Qing Shang’ by Qing Jun Mo Xiao/Please Don’t Laugh, this is a romantic story about two incredible young women. Legend says that the land was once separated by the Luo river. To the south was the agricultural Wei kingdom, and to the north, the nomadic Jing kingdom. Agula, a Princess of the Jing kingdom, had to become a Prince since birth so that her loving parents could stay together. Nangong Jingnu, a Princess of the Wei kingdom, was meant to live a carefree life, but the political struggles of the court made it necessary for her to follow the footsteps of her father. After a war turned Agula into an orphan, she went into hiding for ten years, honing her skills in order to infiltrate the Wei kingdom as a sycophantic official and bring chaos to the world. However, due to a series of events, she was appointed to be Nangong Jingnu’s husband at the Qionglin banquet…

title: Honkai: Star Rail  — The Destiny of Each New Dawn
titleRomaji: Benghuai: Xingqiong Tiedao - Yilun Zhaoyang de Mingyun
titleEnglish: Honkai: Star Rail  — The Destiny of Each New Dawn
titleNative: 崩坏：星穹铁道 一轮朝阳的命运

synopsis: Darkest night falls as the sun sets in the west, only to rise again in the east. Such is the destiny of each new dawn. (Source: Honkai Star Rail YouTube Channel)

title: Anomalies
synopsis: We try to enrich ourselves through prayer, faith and devotion to someone or something "other." Similarly, we believe in the existence of "anomalies," such as unknowable and uncontrollable monsters. But can such beliefs advance us? (Source: Official website)

title: Peek-a-boo
synopsis: The old granny playing peek-a-boo is gone. Instead, a stranger appears and draws closer to the child. Peek-a-boo involves exercising memory, and looking directly at your partner. 1st Year Work 2011 by Keiko Shiraishi, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

synopsis: She wears a white mask to keep her sadness hidden from others. How can she free herself from the darkness of her mind? Graduate Work 2017 my Man Yee LAM, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: SHe
synopsis: In a totalitarian and male chauvinist world, a female high-heeled shoe named Mulan Hua rebels against the baby shoe factory to protect her baby girl from being transformed into a male shoe. To raise her daughter, she later has to disguise herself as a male sturdy shoe and works day and night in a capitalist cigarette factory. The story is not only about a mother’s sacrifice and a feminist’s revenge, but also has a political undertone of the intoxication of power. (Source: mulanfestival.com)

title: People who are eating
synopsis: People can show some other personality when eating. Some become like herbivores, chewing so many times. Some become like carps, crowding around bates. Some become like hamsters, with their mouths full, etc.. Everyone is unique and worth observation. 1st year Work 2012, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: the day
synopsis: Erina Kawai's graduation work from 2018 at Tama Art University.

title: Radio Wave
synopsis: Numbers stations were prominently used during the Cold War. A boy was tuning the radio in the snow mountain and happened to tune the shortwave of codes. 1st year work 2016 by Ryotaro Miyajima, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Out of My Mind
synopsis: In my deep dream there comes the landscape in my shapeless eyes. The peaceful sight gradually distorts. When anxiety and upsurge stands behind us, the nightly liberation begins. Graduate Work 2016 by Tomomi Komazaki, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Fleeting Dream
synopsis: A girl is informed by her doctor that she is pregnant. Surprised by the unexpected announcement, she falls into an anguish. She floats between hallucinations and delusions. The fleeting dream is a despairing dream. 1st Year Work 2011 by Mayuko Yamakita, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Pregnancy
tags.description: Features pregnant female characters or discusses the topic of pregnancy.
